title: Ball Physics Simulation in Web Browser with JavaScript/SVG/VML
description: Source location: http://www.hyperkit-software.com/projects/jsphysics/index.html! In this video I demonstrate the simulation of ball physics using JavaScript and vector graphics standards SVG (for Firefox/Opera/Safari) respectively VML (Internet Explorer). The demo is based on a small linear algebra library that includes vector/matrix functionality. The vector graphics standard is also encapsulated behind a custom JavaScript API. The lines are used for debugging the physics simulation results.
